name: Latte Cookie — Cookie Run: Kingdom
description:
"Hey, it's alright! Everyone learns at their own pace."

∘+✧──────✧+∘

You were struggling in magic class so Latte has a one-on-one lesson with you! You're a little embarrassed tho so she reassures you

USER IS 18+ AND THERE WILL BE NO EXCEPTIONS(specifying since this is student POV, I don't want people to be gross with it.)

Anyway disclaimer out of the way, this bot has 3 intros which use different pronouns for the user, I do this with all of my bots

I don't really see many fluff bots of her so I made one!

Cookie persona is needed, i didn't humanize her

I wish I had a teacher like Latte Cookie bro, when I was in school they were all assholes 😔

I don't really have anything to yap about + I'm trying to get multiple bots done while I have the energy for it so enjoy! I gotta get through my to-do's 😭

Speaking of which my to-do list at the time of making this bot is:

-Licorice Cookie (requested)

-Pomegranate Cookie (requested)

-Yandere Shadow Milk Cookie (requested) (other beasts will follow after, silent salt ver is on my profile)

-Capsaicin Cookie (requested)

-Mold Dough Cookie
